name: Rise Gold Corp.
summary: Rise Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration company incorporated in Nevada in 2007. Its primary asset is the Idaho-Maryland Gold Mine Property near Grass Valley, California, a major past-producing high-grade gold property owned through its wholly owned subsidiary Rise Grass Valley Inc. The company is pursuing vested mining rights litigation and plans underground gold mining at 1,000 tons per day using gravity and flotation processing when approvals are obtained.

products.name: Idaho-Maryland Gold Mine
products.description: Past-producing high-grade underground gold mine property in Grass Valley, California, targeting 1,000 tons per day throughput with gravity and flotation gold concentrate production.
